title: On Holding Q2 2022 Revenue Soars 32%, Raises Guidance
text: On Holding reported Q2 2022 net sales that increased 32% to CHF 749.2 million with direct-to-consumer net sales rising 47.2% to CHF 308.3 million. Gross profit margin increased to 61.5% from 59.9% and adjusted EBITDA margin rose to 18.2% from 16.0%. The company raised its full-year outlook, now expecting net sales growth of at least 31% year-over-year on a constant currency basis, compared to previous target of 28%. Gross profit margin guidance ranges between 60.5-61.0%. Co-founder David Allemann commented on the company's strategy: We achieved a remarkable 38.2% net sales growth on a constant currency basis, not by chasing trends, but by building a resilient brand for decades ahead. The strong Q2 performance demonstrated On's ability to maintain momentum despite a challenging supply chain environment.
